executives.name: Charles Robbins
executives.background: Chuck Robbins is Chair and Chief Executive Officer of Cisco. He has served as CEO since July 2015 and was elected Chair of the Board in December 2017. Prior to that, he held various leadership positions at Cisco since joining in 1997, including Senior Vice President of Worldwide Field Operations.

tenure_dates.title: Chair, Chair and Chief Executive Officer, Director

executives.name: Richard Heron
executives.background: Richard Heron is Chief Financial Officer of Cisco. He joined Cisco in 2024. Previously, he served as CFO of Luminar Technologies and held various senior finance roles at other technology companies.

executives.name: Maria Martinez
executives.background: Maria Martinez is Chief Operating Officer of Cisco. She joined Cisco in 2018. Previously, she was President, Global Customer Success and Salesforce Services at Salesforce.com.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Operating Officer

executives.name: Jeffrey Sharritts
executives.background: Jeff Sharritts is Executive Vice President and Chief Customer and Partner Officer. He has been with Cisco since 2000 in various sales leadership roles.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President, Americas / Executive Vice President and Chief Customer Officer

executives.name: Dev Stahlkopf
executives.background: Dev Stahlkopf is Executive Vice President and Chief Legal Officer. She joined Cisco in 2021 from Microsoft, where she was Corporate Vice President and General Counsel.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Legal Officer

executives.name: Anshul Sadana
executives.background: Anshul Sadana has served as our Chief Operating Officer since May 2019. Previously, he served as our Senior Vice President, Customer Engineering from January 2016 to May 2019. Mr. Sadana joined Arista in 2007 and has held various leadership roles in engineering and customer advocacy. Prior to Arista, he held engineering positions at Cisco Systems and Nortel Networks. Mr. Sadana holds a B.E. in Electronics and Communication from the University of Delhi and an M.S. in Computer Science from the University of Illinois at Chicago.

executives.name: Carrie Palin
executives.background: Carrie Palin has been a member of our Board since February 2021. She is currently the Senior Vice President and Chief Marketing Officer of Cisco Systems, Inc.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President and Chief Marketing Officer

executives.name: Cedrik Neike
executives.background: Cedrik Neike is CEO of Digital Industries and a member of the Managing Board. He joined Siemens in 1997, spent time at Cisco Systems, and returned to Siemens in 2017.

executives.name: Chantelle Breithaupt
executives.background: Chantelle Breithaupt has served as our Chief Financial Officer since February 2024. Prior to joining Arista, Ms. Breithaupt served as Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of Aspen Technology, Inc. from 2021 to 2023. Previously, she held various senior finance roles at Cisco Systems, Inc. and General Electric Company. Ms. Breithaupt holds a B.A. in Economics and Business from Wilfrid Laurier University.

executives.name: Charles Giancarlo
executives.background: Chairman and CEO of Pure Storage, Inc. Former Managing Director at Silver Lake Partners and Executive Vice President at Cisco Systems.

executives.name: Colette Kress
executives.background: Colette M. Kress joined NVIDIA in 2013 as Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer. Prior to NVIDIA, Ms. Kress served as Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of the Business Software and Services division of Cisco Systems, Inc. from 2010 to 2013. She also spent 13 years at Microsoft Corporation in various finance roles, including Chief Financial Officer of the Server and Tools division. Ms. Kress holds a B.S. degree in Finance from the University of Arizona and an M.B.A. degree from the University of Washington.

tenure_dates.title: SVP, CFO - Business Technology & Operations Finance

executives.name: Frank Calderoni
executives.background: Former Chairman and CEO of Anaplan, Inc. Director since 2012.

executives.name: Gary Moore
executives.background: Gary Moore is the former Executive Chairman and CEO of ServiceSource International, Inc. and previously served as President and COO of Cisco Systems, Inc.

executives.name: George Kurian
executives.background: George Kurian has served as our Chief Executive Officer since June 2015 and as a director since June 2015. He also served as our President from May 2014 to June 2015. Mr. Kurian joined NetApp in April 2011 as Senior Vice President, Storage Solutions Group and was promoted to Executive Vice President, Product Operations in September 2013. Prior to joining NetApp, Mr. Kurian was Vice President and General Manager, Application Networking and Services Group at Cisco Systems from 2002 to 2011. He also held roles at Akamai Technologies, McKinsey & Company and Oracle Corporation.

tenure_dates.title: Vice President and General Manager, Application Networking and Switching Technology Group

executives.name: Jayshree Ullal
executives.background: Jayshree Ullal has served as our President and Chief Executive Officer and a member of our board of directors since October 2008. Prior to joining Arista, Ms. Ullal was Senior Vice President at Cisco Systems, Inc., where she was responsible for the data center, switching and services business. Ms. Ullal holds a B.S. in Engineering (Electrical) from San Francisco State University and an M.S. in Engineering Management from Santa Clara University.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President, Data Center, Switching and Security

executives.name: John Harris II
executives.background: Former Vice President of Business Development for Raytheon Company and CEO of Raytheon International.

executives.name: John Hennessy
executives.background: John L. Hennessy has served as the Chair of the Board of Alphabet since 2018 and as a director since 2004. He was the President of Stanford University from 2000 to 2016.

tenure_dates.title: Member of the Board of Directors

executives.name: Kelly Kramer
executives.background: Former EVP and CFO of Cisco Systems, Inc. Former executive at GE.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer

executives.name: Kevin Weil
executives.background: Mr. Weil has served as our President, Product and Business since May 2021. Prior to joining Planet, Mr. Weil served as Vice President of Product for Novi at Facebook from 2018 to 2021 and as Vice President of Product at Instagram from 2016 to 2018. Mr. Weil holds a B.A. in Mathematics and Physics from Rice University and an M.S. in Physics from Stanford University.

executives.name: Kristina Johnson
executives.background: Former President of The Ohio State University. Former Chancellor of the State University of New York.

executives.name: Marc Benioff
executives.background: Marc Benioff is Chair, Chief Executive Officer and Co-Founder of Salesforce. He founded the company in 1999 and has served as Chairman since its inception. He has served as Chief Executive Officer since 2001.

tenure_dates.title: Member of the Board of Directors

executives.name: Mark Garrett
executives.background: Former Executive Vice President and CFO of Adobe Systems Incorporated.

executives.name: Michael Capellas
executives.background: Founder and CEO of Capellas Strategic Partners. Former Chairman and CEO of First Data Corporation and Compaq Computer Corporation.

executives.name: Michele Burns
executives.background: Former Chairman and CEO of Mercer LLC. Former CFO of Delta Air Lines, Inc. and Marsh & McLennan Companies, Inc.

executives.name: Nicole Piasecki
executives.background: Former Vice President and General Manager of Propulsion Systems at Boeing Commercial Airplanes.

executives.name: Roderick McGeary
executives.background: Former Chairman of BearingPoint, Inc. and former Co-Vice Chairman of KPMG LLP.

executives.name: Sarah Miller
executives.background: Former Chief Information Officer of Neiman Marcus Group.

executives.name: Todd Nightingale
executives.background: Todd Nightingale has served as our Chief Executive Officer and as a member of our board of directors since September 2022. Prior to joining Fastly, Mr. Nightingale served as Executive Vice President and General Manager, Enterprise Networking and Cloud of Cisco Systems, Inc., a networking and IT company, from March 2020 to September 2022. From June 2016 to March 2020, Mr. Nightingale served as Senior Vice President and General Manager, Cisco Meraki.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and General Manager, Enterprise Networking and Cloud

executives.name: Wesley Bush
executives.background: Former Chairman and CEO of Northrop Grumman Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: Charles Robbins
board_of_directors.background: Chair and CEO of Cisco Systems, Inc.

Prior to joining Planet, Mr. Weil served as Vice President of Product for Novi at Facebook from 2018 to 2021 and as Vice President of Product at Instagram from 2016 to 2018. Mr. Weil holds a B.A. in Mathematics and Physics from Rice University and an M.S. in Physics from Stanford University.
